mapper.select: SELECT s. FROM pdp_project_stage s JOIN pdp_project p ON p.id=s.project_id WHERE p.workspace_id=#{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND s.project_id=#{projectId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND s.id=#{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

SELECT s. FROM pdp_project_stage s JOIN pdp_project p ON p.id=s.project_id WHERE p.workspace_id=#{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND s.project_id=#{projectId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY sequence_no,id
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_project_stage SET name=#{name},top_lifecycle_state=#{topLifecycleState},state=#{state},owner_id=#{ownerId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler},sequence_no=#{sequenceNo},revision=#{revision} WHERE id=#{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision=#{revision}-1
